mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assistant_recommendation ( recommendation_id, user_id, request_id, thread_id, mode, candidate_count, rule_version, created_at ) VALUES ( #{recommendationId}, #{userId}, #{requestId}, #{threadId}, #{mode}, #{candidateCount}, #{ruleVersion}, #{createdAt} )

INSERT INTO assistant_recommendation_item ( recommendation_id, spu_id, sku_id, selected, rank_position, rank_score ) VALUES
( #{recommendationId}, #{item.spuId}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.selected}, #{item.rankPosition}, #{item.rankScore} )
